Pepper__bell___Bacterial_spot.treatment: Remove infected leaves and apply copper-based fungicide.
Pepper__bell___Bacterial_spot.fertilizer: Use potassium-rich fertilizer to improve resistance.

Pepper__bell___healthy.treatment: No disease detected. Maintain proper watering and sunlight.

Potato__Late_blight.treatment: Use fungicide and remove infected plants immediately.

Potato___Early_blight.treatment: Apply fungicide and avoid overhead watering.

Potato___healthy.treatment: Plant is healthy. Maintain good soil and watering.

Tomato_Bacterial_spot.treatment: Remove infected leaves and use copper sprays.

Tomato_Early_blight.treatment: Use fungicides and rotate crops yearly.

Tomato_Late_blight.treatment: Destroy infected plants and avoid wet leaves.

Tomato_Leaf_Mold.treatment: Improve air circulation and apply fungicide.

Tomato_Septoria_leaf_spot.treatment: Remove affected leaves and use fungicide.

Tomato__Target_spot.treatment: Apply fungicide and remove infected leaves.

Tomato__Tomato_mosaic_virus.treatment: Remove infected plants and disinfect tools.
Tomato__Tomato_mosaic_virus.fertilizer: Use balanced fertilizer to support growth.

Tomato__Tomato_YellowLeaf__Curl_Virus.treatment: Control whiteflies and remove infected plants.
